title: Goozy Grape Nosh Parfait
description: A colorful and refreshing dessert made with goozy, grape, and nosh, perfect for a warm evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the goozy and nosh until well combined.
Gently fold in the halved grapes.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with additional grapes if desired.
